description: Style NoteThis fastrack watch gets a new season update in its styling and design details. For maximum impact, style this with your off-duty staples and throw on a few tonal accessories for added measure. This zingy time piece is sure to give a face-lift to your summer wardrobe!Product DetailsCase style:  Analog watch with plastic round case in olive green and a black bezelDial style: Black dial with silver hands and printed text on the dialStrap style: Olive green rubber strap with a tang claspFeatures: Brand logo on the dialWater resistant 30 M that can be used around sinks and rain splashesWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 36 mmCase thickness: 7 mm
